generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and security, I'm glad to see our leaders taking proactive steps to strengthen domestic security powers. The recent proposal to expand surveillance capabilities isn't about infringing on liberties—it's about staying ahead of evolving threats. We've seen how unpreparedness can lead to disasters. It's our duty to support measures that keep our communities safe. #SecurityFirst #ProactiveNotReactive
